title: I'm still young I'll earn more in the future
author: bondwoodssa
selftext:
I made a single profit of $330k by selling AMD call options, while my initial cost basis was less than $30kThis trade brought my cumulative returns to over 600%

This isn't due to any special talent on my part it simply validates the simple truth of choosing quality companies and holding them for the long term I'm not offering investment advice just sharing the real-life experience of an ordinary investor If you also have investment philosophies worth adhering to feel free to connect I will regularly share potential investment opportunities discovered through research and will carefully reply to every private message because wisdom and patience are equally important on the road to wealth accumulation

comments.author: splashmountain37
comments.body: How much was it at purchase? Or what did you invest to sell it for

replies.author: bondwoodssa
replies.body: I initially invested $29,720 to open this options position and eventually closed it at $330k resulting in a net profit of slightly over $300k You can DM me

comments.author: Mcstonied
comments.body:
"Hi guys, here's a simple trick to make 300k!"

"Firstly, start with 30k to invest in a single stock."
